title: invaild's modpack
description: A single-player based Fabric modpack that includes Create Fabric, Applied Energistics 2, and Farmer's Delight Refabricated.
body:
# invaild's modpack

I initially created this modpack for personal use, and I plan to keep adding mods that I enjoy. In the future, I'll be including a Vanilla Tweaks resource pack and datapacks. Now, I would also like to share it with the world for others to try.

Built on Fabric and intended for single-player use, this modpack features a variety of client-side and server-side mods that enhance gameplay and provide plenty of fun. While I haven't included any default mod configurations, there are some preset game options to help you get started.

Some of the mods I use the most are [Yung's Better Structures](/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG), [Create Fabric](/mod/create-fabric), [Applied Energistics 2](/mod/ae2), [Legendary Tooltips](/mod/legendary-tooltips), [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](/mod/rei), [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated), and [Xaero's Minimap](/mod/xaeros-minima), just to name a few.

I hope you enjoy exploring this modpack as much as I do!

## Shaders

In addition to the mods, my modpack also includes the [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](/shader/complementary-unbound).

## Resource packs

I have used the [Eclectic Trove (Legendary Tooltips)](/resourcepack/eclectic-trove-legendary-tooltips) resource pack as it is recommended to use with the [Legendary Tooltips](/mod/legendary-tooltips) mod. The description of the resource pack can be found below.

> This resource pack replaces the default "level 0" border built into Legendary Tooltips, and provides 9 additional custom borders for use as you see fit for your game/modpack.  If you would like to use this resource pack without worrying about configuration, download the "noconfig" version of the pack.  This version contains a built-in configuration that works well for vanilla and some mods.
>
> If you would like more granular control over what items show what borders, please note that you will need to configure Legendary Tooltips yourself.  Documentation can be found here, please read that first.

## Licenses

Other than [MiniHUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud) and [Tweakeroo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tweakeroo), all mods come from Modrinth. MiniHUD and Tweakeroo both have a LGPL-3.0 license which can be found here:
  - MiniHUD: [https://github.com/maruohon/minihud/blob/pre-rewrite/fabric/1.20.x/LICENSE.txt](https://github.com/maruohon/minihud/blob/pre-rewrite/fabric/1.20.x/LICENSE.txt)
- Tweakeroo: [https://github.com/maruohon/tweakeroo/blob/pre-rewrite/fabric/1.20.x/LICENSE.txt](https://github.com/maruohon/tweakeroo/blob/pre-rewrite/fabric/1.20.x/LICENSE.txt)
